decks.notes: This deck revolves around using Basim Ibn Ishaq as the commander to create a fast-paced, aggressive style of play. The deck includes a mix of efficient creatures, disruption spells, and powerful artifacts to apply early pressure and control the game. By utilizing cards like Fatal Push, Thoughtseize, Counterspell, and True-Name Nemesis, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while establishing a strong board presence. With access to powerful spells like Demonic Tutor and Toxic Deluge, as well as strong artifact support like Urza, Lord High Artificer and Spellskite, the deck can adapt to different situations and maintain the upper hand. Overall, the key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent quickly and decisively.

This deck focuses on quickly developing a board presence and applying pressure on the opponent with aggressive creatures, efficient spells, and powerful equipment. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with countermagic and removal spells while maintaining card advantage through draw spells and versatile threats. Aragorn, King of Gondor, leads the charge as the primary commander, supported by a range of creatures and spells that can quickly close out the game. The deck's strategy revolves around establishing an early advantage and leveraging it to control the battlefield and secure victory, using a combination of tempo plays, card advantage, and evasive threats.

The deck revolves around utilizing the powerful abilities of Grist, the Hunger Tide to create a fast-paced and aggressive playstyle. By combining efficient creatures like Birds of Paradise, Elves of Deep Shadow, and Llanowar Elves with disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Duress, the deck aims to control the game early on while putting pressure on the opponent. Cards like Abrupt Decay and Fatal Push provide removal options, while powerful creatures like Hogaak, Arisen Necropolis and Yawgmoth, Thran Physician add additional threats to the board. The deck also includes powerful tutor effects like Demonic Tutor and Green Sun's Zenith to ensure consistency and access to key cards.

The deck revolves around utilizing control elements to disrupt and outvalue opponents, ultimately aiming to establish a strong board presence and win the game through card advantage and powerful threats. Tasigur, the Golden Fang is the commander of choice, offering card advantage and flexibility in accessing different types of answers from the graveyard. The deck includes a variety of removal spells, counterspells, card draw engines, and versatile threats like Archon of Cruelty and Koma, Cosmos Serpent. By carefully managing resources and disrupting opponents' game plans, the deck aims to control the pace of the game until it can deploy its win conditions and secure victory.

The deck revolves around controlling the game through a combination of powerful spells such as Counterspell, Demonic Tutor, and Force of Negation, as well as disruptive creatures like Baleful Strix and True-Name Nemesis. Aminatou, the Fateshifter's ability to manipulate the top of the library allows for card selection and synergy with cards like Enlightened Tutor and Brainstorm. The deck also includes a variety of removal spells like Fatal Push and Swords to Plowshares to deal with threats efficiently. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Opposition Agent disrupts opponents' strategies and ensures the deck maintains control of the game tempo.

This deck focuses on fast-paced aggressive plays, utilizing a variety of low mana cost creatures, burn spells, and disruptive counterspells to control the board and pressure the opponent. The commander, Satya, Aetherflux Genius, helps generate card advantage and provides efficient removal options. The deck is designed to consistently apply pressure to the opponent while disrupting their game plan with cards like Drannith Magistrate and Containment Priest. The inclusion of powerful cards like Spell Pierce, Swords to Plowshares, and Brazen Borrower allows for flexibility in dealing with various threats. By maintaining a proactive game plan and utilizing efficient removal and disruption, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a quick victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and powerful removal spells to control the board and pressure the opponent. Ashling, the Limitless serves as the commander, capable of dealing damage to all creatures and players on the battlefield. The deck includes a mix of efficient mana dorks like Birds of Paradise and Elves of Deep Shadow, along with versatile removal spells like Fatal Push and Lightning Bolt. It also includes powerful creatures like Giver of Runes and Melira, the Living Cure to protect its own threats. The deck aims to quickly establish a board presence and disrupt the opponent's game plan, ultimately overwhelming them with efficient threats and removal.

The deck revolves around utilizing powerful reanimation spells, such as Animate Dead and Necromancy, to cheat big creatures like Griselbrand and Archon of Cruelty onto the battlefield early. By combining graveyard recursion with cards like Dance of the Dead and Shallow Grave, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a quick and aggressive strategy. Additionally, the deck includes strong tutors like Demonic Tutor and Enlightened Tutor to find key pieces efficiently, while also incorporating disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Inquisition of Kozilek to control the opponent's hand. The deck's reliance on graveyard manipulation and explosive creature plays makes it a formidable force in the 1 vs 1 format.
